step_rationale: Postprandial remnant lipoprotein; atherogenic substrate and thrombotic stimulus.
mechanism: Chylomicron remnants are postprandial atherogenic lipoproteins that promote vascular inflammation and atherosclerotic plaque development.

references.title: Remnant lipoproteins and atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
